results.title: How to Fold Chinese Dumpling — Woks of Life
results.judge_reason: Source-domain only culinary how-to about pleating dumplings; no LLM/prompt-engineering content and no asymmetric-prompt analog.

results.title: Ten ways to fold dumplings — Red House Spice
results.judge_reason: Cooking guide cataloguing dumpling fold variants including directional one-way; purely source-side with no LLM mapping.

results.title: 4 Ways to Fold a Chinese Dumpling
results.judge_reason: Culinary technique catalogue with no LLM or asymmetric prompt-design connection.

results.title: Prompt Templates: Systematic Analysis (2025/4)
results.judge_reason: Analyzes prompt template components (Directive, Context, Output Format, Constraints) but does not propose an asymmetric flat-back/pleated-front directional-pleat geometry.

results.title: Content-Format Integrated Prompt Optimization (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Hierarchical format pool with renderer/query components; candidate's own novelty claim explicitly distinguishes it as not asymmetric pleated structure.

results.title: Modular Prompt Optimization with Section-Local Textual Gradients (2026/1)
results.judge_reason: Section-local prompt optimization is modular but does not embody an asymmetric flat-back+directional-pleated-front geometry.

results.title: SLOT: Structuring LLM Output (2025/5)
results.judge_reason: Generic structured-output framework lacking the asymmetric pleat/flat-back design.

results.title: Price of Format: Diversity Collapse (2025/5)
results.judge_reason: Studies format-constraint side effects, unrelated to asymmetric directional-pleat prompt geometry.

notes: Three source-side culinary URLs trip the keyword-overlap threshold (jiaozi/pleat fold/directional crease appear directly). LLM-side arxiv results are thematically near but neither keyword nor semantic thresholds are met for the asymmetric-pleat framing. Under strict OR rule, total_hits=3 >= 1 yields FAIL.
